description: Style NoteThis active tee from jockey is a must have summer essential that can be worn for all your training sessions or when you're chilling out with friends. The soft moisture management fabric gives you a comfortable feel and the vibrant colours keep you looking fashionable. Pair this tee with track pants and training shoes or shorts and sandals.Product DetailsWhite T-shirt that has a round neck, short sleeves, stretch fabric that ensures freedom of movement and comfort, mesh panels on the front at the sides and reflective print on the chestMaterial and CareCotton/elastaneMachine wash delicate inside out at 40 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorations
